subject: [PATCH 01/14] mm: decouple protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch decouples the protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING by introducing a new configuration option, CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE. This allows architectures that support present-but-inaccessible page table entries (protnone PTEs) to select this option independently of NUMA balancing. The six supported architectures are updated to select this option, and the protnone infrastructure is made available for use beyond NUMA balancing, such as in userfaultfd working set tracking. No functional changes are introduced, but the infrastructure is now decoupled from NUMA balancing.
